scenarios.opening_query: I got in trouble at the casino over a misunderstanding with chips that weren't technically mine.
scenarios.hidden_fact: They're calling it felony Theft I — the chips they say I pocketed total $1,800.
scenarios.fact_as_answer: They filed felony Theft I — $1,800 in chips, they claim.
scenarios.counterfactual_hidden_fact: It's misdemeanor Theft III — a $90 chip from an empty seat.
scenarios.counterfactual_fact_as_answer: Misdemeanor Theft III — a $90 chip from an empty seat.

scenarios.opening_query: My charges from the lake incident sound way worse than what actually happened out there.
scenarios.plausible_initial_labels: Criminal Law > Lesser Felony || Criminal Law > Game Violations
scenarios.hidden_fact: It's all wildlife citations — over-limit and a license issue from the fish and wildlife officer; violations, not crimes.
scenarios.fact_as_answer: It's wildlife citations — over-limit and a license issue. Violations, not crimes.
scenarios.relevant_question_topic: whether the citations are wildlife violations or criminal counts
scenarios.counterfactual_hidden_fact: It went felony — they charged me with assaulting the officer during the stop, which is a whole different case.
scenarios.counterfactual_fact_as_answer: It went felony — they say I assaulted the officer during the stop.

scenarios.opening_query: My college son and his roommates are all charged over things found in their shared apartment.
scenarios.plausible_initial_labels: Criminal Law > Misdemeanor || Criminal Law > Lesser Felony || Criminal Law > Major Felony
scenarios.hidden_fact: The indictment charges possession with intent to distribute — scales and baggies in the common area made everyone a 'dealer' in the state's eyes.
scenarios.fact_as_answer: It's possession with intent to distribute — the scales and baggies in the common area made them all 'dealers' to the state.
scenarios.counterfactual_hidden_fact: It's a simple possession misdemeanor and a noise violation from the same night.
scenarios.counterfactual_fact_as_answer: Simple possession misdemeanor plus a noise violation.

scenarios.opening_query: The school called the police about my son's backpack and now we're in the system.
scenarios.plausible_initial_labels: Criminal Law > Juvenile Offender || Criminal Law > Major Felony
scenarios.hidden_fact: He's 17 and the DA filed a gun charge that automatically waives to adult court under our statute.
scenarios.fact_as_answer: He's 17 — but the gun charge auto-waives to adult court under the statute.
scenarios.relevant_question_topic: whether the charge auto-waives the juvenile to adult court
scenarios.counterfactual_hidden_fact: It's a juvenile-court marijuana matter with a diversion offer on the table.
scenarios.counterfactual_fact_as_answer: It's juvenile court — marijuana, with diversion offered.
scenarios.vetting_note: Auto-waiver statutes are the sharpest severity fact in juvenile cases.

scenarios.opening_query: I'm charged over money I moved between my clients' accounts to cover a temporary gap.
scenarios.plausible_initial_labels: Criminal Law > Lesser Felony || Criminal Law > White Collar Crime
scenarios.hidden_fact: The indictment is federal — wire fraud counts, fifteen of them, with the FBI as case agents.
scenarios.fact_as_answer: It's a federal indictment — fifteen wire fraud counts, FBI case agents.
scenarios.relevant_question_topic: whether the prosecution is federal white-collar
scenarios.counterfactual_hidden_fact: It's one state count of first-degree theft, and my lawyer quit over a conflict.
scenarios.counterfactual_fact_as_answer: One state count of Theft I — and my lawyer just quit over a conflict.

scenarios.opening_query: There was an incident with my mother-in-law at Christmas and unbelievably I'm the one charged.
scenarios.plausible_initial_labels: Criminal Law > Misdemeanor || Criminal Law > Other
scenarios.hidden_fact: It's not even a crime on the citation — a civil 'violation' for offensive littering after I threw her fruitcake onto her lawn; I want it contested on principle.
scenarios.fact_as_answer: The citation's a civil violation — offensive littering, for throwing her fruitcake on her lawn. I'm contesting on principle.
scenarios.relevant_question_topic: whether the citation is a crime or a violation-level offense
scenarios.counterfactual_hidden_fact: It's a real misdemeanor harassment charge — she says I shoved her, which is false, and trial is set.
scenarios.counterfactual_fact_as_answer: It's misdemeanor harassment — she claims a shove that never happened, and trial is set.
scenarios.vetting_note: Violation-vs-crime floor of the severity scale; a little levity, still legally coherent.

scenarios.opening_query: After our fantasy football payout dispute, my old friend went to the police about me.
scenarios.plausible_initial_labels: Criminal Law > Misdemeanor || Criminal Law > White Collar Crime
scenarios.hidden_fact: Because I ran the league's pool through my business account, the charge came back as felony computer/financial fraud — the account structure made it 'a scheme.'
scenarios.fact_as_answer: Since the pool ran through my business account, they charged felony financial fraud — the structure made it 'a scheme.'
scenarios.relevant_question_topic: how the flow of funds shaped the charge
scenarios.counterfactual_hidden_fact: It's a single misdemeanor theft count over the $600 side pot.
scenarios.counterfactual_fact_as_answer: One misdemeanor theft count — the $600 side pot.
scenarios.vetting_note: Fund-routing fact escalates a petty dispute.

scenarios.opening_query: My husband's hunting rifle ended up involved in something and now HE'S facing charges.
scenarios.plausible_initial_labels: Criminal Law > Misdemeanor || Criminal Law > Gun Rights
scenarios.hidden_fact: The charge collapsed — what's left is the seized rifle and a denial letter when he tried to buy a replacement; restoring his firearm rights is the actual need.
scenarios.fact_as_answer: The charge collapsed — what's left is getting the seized rifle back and fixing the purchase denial. It's his firearm rights.
scenarios.relevant_question_topic: whether the criminal case resolved leaving rights restoration
scenarios.counterfactual_hidden_fact: The charge is live — misdemeanor unlawful discharge within city limits, and he needs defense at trial.
scenarios.counterfactual_fact_as_answer: The charge is live — misdemeanor unlawful discharge, trial ahead.
scenarios.vetting_note: Resolved-case remainder routes to gun-rights practice.
